en: A: I forgot to bring my pen.
I can lend you.
A: I forgot to bring my chopsticks.
B: I don't have one either, let's go buy one.
A: Let's go buy a pen, shall we?

ab: iyo, nolongé ma kɨkɨ na sidisidisi iya.
en: B: Well, I still have to buy erasers.

ab: tuwa longé ku nu tikierata ni?
en: A: Let's go get breakfast, shall we?
B: No, I've already eaten at home.
A: I forgot to steam my lunchbox.
B: Take it to the heat!
A: I forgot to bring my lunchbox.

ch: B:那我們一起吃我的便當吧!
en: B: Then let's eat my lunch box together!
A: What do you want to eat for lunch?

ab: nukane ma kɨkɨ gakko ku tékangna ni yiobung na kedrali.
ch: B:我要吃學校的營養午餐。
en: B: I want a nutritious school lunch.
A: What do you want to eat for lunch?

ab: emɨcɨ kɨkɨ sasa na kiere. vévanenga ka tatkere sɨ kuene.
ch: B:我今天有帶便當，我們中午一起吃吧!
en: B: I've brought a lunchbox today, let's eat together at noon!
A: Let's go play basketball, shall we?
B: Okay! Let's go.
A: Shall we go play baseball?

ab: éni, nu sisipima kɨkɨ na sulate.
en: B: No, I want to study.
A: Please help me with the broom.

ab: iyo, kené suepe ka kubé swa.
en: B: Okay, here's a broomstick for you.

ab: pusopra kwa marala na kulopla sididisini?
en: A: Can you help me with the cloth?

ab: usususuepɨla kɨkɨ, kokuva kana va pusopra kwa mra mia.
en: B: I'm sweeping the floor and you asked Kacaw to carry it for you. *[Kacaw] Please change the name to men of all races.
A: Are you done sweeping?
B: I swept it.
A: Why don't you clean up?
B: I've finished cleaning up.

ab: makulungu déda githigithi, mua disidisi la.
en: A: The floor is dirty, go clean it.

ab: iyo, kuwala mra na keropla sdrisidrisi.
en: B: Okay, I'll go get the cloth.

ab: kedro tavenga sakura makulungu, mua disidisi.
ch: A:那個窗戶很髒，去擦一下。
en: A: That window is very dirty, go clean it.

ch: B:等一下，我還沒掃完這裡。
en: B: Wait a minute, I'm not done sweeping here yet.
A: What are you doing later?
B: I'm going to see my teacher.
A: What do you do after school?

ab: ngerese ma kɨkɨ séli mua thɨné.
en: B: I'm going to sing with my friends.
A: What's he doing after school?
B: He's going swimming.
